TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_caduk, title = caduk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/caduk} }

S.FORM: caduk ťŹüŚ≠ź siwkay nu balat u malukay a sakaluk, taneng mibelih miala ku lala'. matinpi ku tangah, sisakapetay a culay. tinaku a kamu caduken ŚéĽťŹü caduken kiya lala' milacul i kazizeng. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A shovel is a tool for digging, lifting, and moving bulk materials, such as soil, coal, gravel, snow, sand, or ore. Most shovels are hand tools consisting of a broad blade fixed to a medium-length handle. Shovel blades are usually made of sheet steel or hard plastics and are very strong. Shovel handles are usually made of wood or glass-reinforced plastic (fibreglass).
S.PHON: ¶aduk ** siwkaj nu bar~…ĺat u mar~…ĺukaj a sakar~…ĺuk, tan…ôŇč mib…ôr~…ĺińß miar~…ĺa ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. matinpi ku taŇčańß, sisakap…ôtaj a ¶ur~…ĺaj. tinaku a kamu ¶aduk…ôn ** ¶aduk…ôn kija r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ i kaziz…ôŇč. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika a sńßo*…ôr~…ĺ is a toor~…ĺ for diggiŇč, r~…ĺiftiŇč, and mo*iŇč bur~…ĺk mat…ôriar~…ĺs, su ¶ńß as soir~…ĺ, ¶oar~…ĺ, gra*…ôr~…ĺ, snow, sand, or or…ô. most sńßo*…ôr~…ĺs ar…ô ńßand toor~…ĺs ¶onsistiŇč of a broad br~…ĺad…ô fi*…ôd to a m…ôdium-r~…ĺ…ôŇčtńß ńßandr~…ĺ…ô. sńßo*…ôr~…ĺ br~…ĺad…ôs ar…ô usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj mad…ô of sńß…ô…ôt st…ô…ôr~…ĺ or ńßard pr~…ĺasti ¶s and ar…ô *…ôrj stroŇč. sńßo*…ôr~…ĺ ńßandr~…ĺ…ôs ar…ô usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj mad…ô of wood or gr~…ĺass-r…ôinfor ¶…ôd pr~…ĺasti ¶ (fibr…ôgr~…ĺass).
S.FORM: caduk ťŹüŚ≠ź siwkay nu balat u malukay a sakaluk, taneng mibelih miala ku lala'. matinpi ku tangah, sisakapetay a culay. tinaku a kamu caduken ŚéĽťŹü caduken kiya lala' milacul i kazizeng. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A shovel is a tool for digging, lifting, and moving bulk materials, such as soil, coal, gravel, snow, sand, or ore. Most shovels are hand tools consisting of a broad blade fixed to a medium-length handle. Shovel blades are usually made of sheet steel or hard plastics and are very strong. Shovel handles are usually made of wood or glass-reinforced plastic (fibreglass).
